artifacts.name: agents-truth
artifacts.description: AI single source of truth: project identity, git workflow, tech stack, canonical status and role enums, core architecture rules, and anti-patterns

artifacts.name: workflow-and-business-rules
artifacts.description: Complete workflow lifecycle: all 18 status transitions, business rules per stage, role responsibilities, and simplified status mapping for Data Entry users

artifacts.name: system-architecture
artifacts.description: Overall system architecture: component diagram, infrastructure layout, service boundaries, and data flow between backend and frontend

artifacts.name: database-and-models
artifacts.description: Canonical database schema: table definitions, foreign keys, canonical status and role enum values, model relationships, and indexing strategy

artifacts.name: frontend-guide
artifacts.description: Frontend architecture: Nuxt 4 project structure, composable patterns, store conventions, RTL rules, role-aware UI rules, and component anti-patterns

artifacts.name: backend-guide
artifacts.description: Backend architecture: Laravel 11 service-oriented patterns, WorkflowService contract, security rules, audit logging requirements, and coding conventions

artifacts.name: api-reference
artifacts.description: Full API contract: all endpoints, HTTP methods, request/response shapes, permission matrix per role, error codes, and pagination conventions

artifacts.name: design-system
artifacts.description: Visual design system: color tokens, typography scale, spacing grid, component radius/sizing rules, RTL layout conventions, and status color semantics

artifacts.name: planning-epics
artifacts.description: Full epic and story breakdown: all planned features, acceptance criteria, and implementation scope for the entire Yemen Flow Hub platform

artifacts.name: project-context
artifacts.description: Project context document: stakeholder needs, constraints, goals, and technical decisions captured during planning
